body.title: Seed PROC_SCOPE_GUARD: tier table, op_delta, ring scope_log, escalate on HIGH writes
body.result: Created tools/scope_guard.py: _classify_tier() (tier table: brainstem=HIGH, cognition/main/cortex=MEDIUM, else=LOW), run_scope_guard(basket) checks hypothesis file, ring push category=scope_decision, escalates on HIGH+write/delete. Wired into pe_chain.py between HYPOTHESIZE and IMPLEMENT. Added to __init__.py. 16 tests passing.
body.description: Create tools/scope_guard.py with run_scope_guard(): checks basket target_file against tier table (brainstem=HIGH,cognition=MEDIUM,tools=LOW), op_delta (read=0/write=1/delete=2), posts to ring category=scope_decision, sets basket['pe_status']='escalated' on HIGH+write/delete. Register tool. Add SCOPE_GUARD step to pe_chain.py after HYPOTHESIZE. Seed PROC_SCOPE_GUARD PROCEDURAL memory node with code_ref.
